name: raw_mediapipe_landmark_sequence
description: Caller provides 8 consecutive raw MediaPipe landmark frames. The bundle internally applies pos_scale normalization per frame, flattens to 63d joint features, builds first-order temporal deltas, and produces the final [8,126] model input.
notes: Official caller contract is raw sequence only: shape [8,63] or [8,21,3].
Internal model features are x0..z20 (63d joint) + d_x0..d_z20 (63d delta).
Delta = current_frame - previous_frame and the first frame delta is all zeros.
Maintain a rolling raw landmark buffer of 8 frames in the frontend.
feature_order.json describes the internal 126d model feature order, not the caller raw input order.
